summary: Leads Module (Phase 3 Strangler Fig) testing completed. All 28 backend API tests passed. The new modular leads routes from /app/backend/routes/leads.py are working correctly with USE_NEW_LEADS_ROUTES=true.
critical_code_review_comments: Leads module extraction is clean and follows Strangler Fig pattern correctly
routes/leads.py properly imports from services/lead_service.py and services/auth_service.py
Feature flag USE_NEW_LEADS_ROUTES=true correctly routes to new modular leads routes
User isolation is properly enforced - users can only access their own leads
All CRUD operations work correctly: Create, Read (list/single), Update, Delete
Phone stats aggregation pipeline works correctly
Preview examples endpoint works without consuming credits
CSV export respects tier restrictions and user isolation
Status transitions work for all valid statuses: new, contacted, qualified, not_qualified, booked
Service injection pattern (set_services) properly injects ai_service, compliance_service, icp_service, crm_service
seed_data_creation: Updated password for test_user_b@example.com to enable multi-tenant isolation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leads module (Phase 3 Strangler Fig) fully tested. New modular routes in /app/backend/routes/leads.py and /app/backend/services/lead_service.py are working correctly. Feature flag USE_NEW_LEADS_ROUTES=true in backend/.env enables the new routes. All leads endpoints tested: CRUD operations, phone-stats, preview-examples, export-csv. User isolation verified - users can only see/modify their own leads.

tests: Create lead with minimal fields (business_name, phone)
Validation error for missing required fields
Returns preview leads without using credits
User cannot access other user's lead
User cannot update other user's lead
User cannot delete other user's lead
Users see only their own leads in list
